content-objects/fluidtemplate.message: Consider PAGEVIEW (available in v13+) as the modern replacement for FLUIDTEMPLATE.

frontend/conditions.message: Legacy conditions ([globalVar = TS:xx], [browser], [system], [device]) were removed in v12. Use Symfony Expression Language exclusively.

about/usage.message: Site Sets (introduced in v13) are the modern way to distribute TypoScript. In v12, prefer structured sys_template includes over inline TypoScript blocks.

frontend/config.message: config.no_cache = 1 must never be used in production. Use COA_INT or USER_INT for uncached content objects instead.

content-objects/user.message: USER_INT marks the entire page as uncacheable. Prefer COA_INT to limit uncached rendering to the specific content object.

functions/stdwrap.message: Prefer getData (getText) over stdWrap.field for simple value access — more readable and avoids unnecessary stdWrap overhead.

content-objects/hmenu.message: Consider MenuProcessor with a Fluid template for new navigation implementations. More flexible than HMENU and aligns with the Fluid-based rendering approach.

content-objects/content.message: In Fluid-based page setups, prefer DatabaseQueryProcessor over the CONTENT cObject for fetching records into Fluid templates.

backend/page-tsconfig/tceform.message: Use TCEFORM to restrict editors to valid choices instead of relying on validation alone. Reduces editor errors at the source.

content-objects/fluidtemplate.message: FLUIDTEMPLATE is deprecated since v13. Use PAGEVIEW for page templates instead.

content-objects/pageview.message: PAGEVIEW is the modern page rendering cObject in v13+. Replaces FLUIDTEMPLATE for page-level templates. Requires a Fluid template with layoutRootPaths and templateRootPaths.

content-objects/hmenu.message: Consider MenuProcessor with Fluid for new navigation implementations. More flexible and maintainable than HMENU/TMENU.

frontend/config.message: config.no_cache = 1 must NEVER be used in production. It disables the page cache entirely. Use COA_INT or USER_INT for uncached content objects.

about/usage.message: Site Sets are the modern way to organize and distribute TypoScript in v13+. They replace sys_template-based static includes. Prefer Site Sets for new extensions and projects.

frontend/conditions.message: Use Symfony Expression Language for all conditions. Legacy bracket syntax ([globalVar], [browser], etc.) was removed in v12.

functions/stdwrap.message: Prefer getData over stdWrap.field for simple value access. More readable and avoids unnecessary stdWrap overhead.

content-objects/user.message: USER_INT marks the entire page as uncacheable. Use sparingly — prefer COA_INT to limit uncached rendering to the specific content object.

data-processors/database-query-processor.message: DatabaseQueryProcessor replaces the CONTENT cObject for Fluid-based templates. Cleaner separation of data retrieval and rendering.

content-objects/content.message: In Fluid-based page setups, prefer DatabaseQueryProcessor over the CONTENT cObject for fetching records into templates.

content-objects/coa.message: COA_INT limits uncached rendering to a single content object without making the whole page uncacheable. Prefer over USER_INT where possible.

functions/typolink.message: For generating links in Fluid templates, prefer the f:uri.typolink and f:link.typolink ViewHelpers over TypoScript typolink to keep logic in Fluid.

backend/page-tsconfig/tceform.message: Use TCEFORM to restrict editors to valid field choices. This prevents invalid data at the source rather than relying on frontend validation.

content-objects/records.message: RECORDS is suited for rendering a fixed set of records by UID. For dynamic queries, use CONTENT or DatabaseQueryProcessor instead.

data-processors/menu-processor.message: MenuProcessor is the preferred way to build navigations in Fluid-based setups. Replaces HMENU/TMENU for new projects.

content-objects/fluidtemplate.message: FLUIDTEMPLATE is removed in TYPO3 v14. Use PAGEVIEW instead.

content-objects/pageview.message: PAGEVIEW is the standard page rendering cObject in v14. Use it for all page-level Fluid template rendering.

about/usage.message: Site Sets are the required way to provide TypoScript in v14. sys_template-based static includes from extensions are no longer supported.

frontend/config.message: config.no_cache = 1 must NEVER be used. It disables the page cache entirely. Use COA_INT or USER_INT for uncached content.

content-objects/user.message: USER_INT marks the entire page as uncacheable. Use sparingly — prefer COA_INT to scope uncached rendering to a single object.

content-objects/hmenu.message: MenuProcessor with Fluid is the recommended navigation approach in v14. HMENU remains available but is not the preferred pattern for new projects.

data-processors/database-query-processor.message: DatabaseQueryProcessor is the standard way to fetch records for Fluid templates in v14. Prefer over the CONTENT cObject in Fluid-based setups.

frontend/conditions.message: Use Symfony Expression Language for all conditions. Legacy bracket syntax was removed in v12 and is not available in v14.

functions/stdwrap.message: Prefer getData over stdWrap.field for simple value access. More readable and avoids unnecessary stdWrap overhead.

data-processors/menu-processor.message: MenuProcessor is the preferred way to build navigations in Fluid-based setups in v14.
